_comment: Versioned threat-intelligence feed for IDEViewer (Phase 1 B5). Operator-curated, intended to be fed from OSV / GitHub Advisory / marketplace-takedown signals over time. The portal loads this at runtime (portal/app/threat_intel.py) and evaluates every reported extension against it during scan-report ingestion. Bump `version` whenever the indicators change; the daemon push-distribution of this feed (signed via the Phase 1 B1 command channel) is a follow-up — today evaluation is server-side only.
